blockingIssues.description: web/components/price-chart.tsx retains hardcoded #555555 crosshair line colors (lines 432, 438) instead of white/38-equivalent tokens required by feature acceptance criteria.
web/components/transactions-table.tsx retains hardcoded #9B9B9B in cells (lines 92, 141) instead of white/65 required by feature acceptance criteria.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update frontend-worker skill color-token guidance to match current Uniswap exact-match palette (#131313 surface, white/65 secondary, white/38 muted) to avoid stale token drift in future tasks.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review report for uniswap-theme-tokens-and-global-colors notes .factory/skills/frontend-worker/SKILL.md still references older color defaults (#212121 and #888888), while this milestone requires Uniswap exact values.

rejectedObservations.observation: Mission validation-state still marks VAL-FIX-004 and VAL-FIX-005 as pending.
